description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named RaZ that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have a Debug build type and use a matrix strategy to build and test the project on multiple platforms (Linux, Windows, macOS, Emscripten) with different compilers (GCC, Clang, MSVC, Emscripten). For each platform, install required packages, configure and build the project using CMake, and run tests.
